descriptionInUI: Runtime for the SCUD hunt. Inert unless the mission generator emits dcsRetribution.mobileMissiles (the 'Mobile missile sites relocate' setting is on and a live theater-missile site exists). Each mobile missile site's vehicles drive to a fresh position within the scoot radius of their campaign-map location every few minutes (alarm-green, weapons hold -- they relocate, they don't stop to fight), so the launcher is never quite where your last recon photo froze it. Movement ONLY: kills are recorded natively like any other unit, the site never migrates beyond the scoot radius, and a dead site simply stops being routed. The radar SAM network is never touched (different object class entirely). Movement begins after a short startup grace.

specificOptions.nameInUI: Seconds between relocations (re-rolls a new position)
Scoot radius around the site's campaign position (m)
Startup grace before the first relocation (s)
